Detlev was on the couch, smoking a cigarette and watching some shit of the tv. He was so caught up in the televison he didnt even notice his kid Wally, tiptowing the down the stairs. I mean not that he would care anyway but while Wally was making his way to the front door and opening it slowly, the door just had to make that annoying creak sound that alerted Detlev that wally was there. Groaning lowly he got up from off the couch and made his way towards wally, glaring daggers at the boy. "Where do you think your going kid?" He asked sternly. "I-I’m going out to my friends house, to study a test.." Wally stuttered a bit with his words but managed to speak.

"Why dont you just invite your little friend to come to you instead? I’m sure they would love to meet your garadian.." Wally was quite stunned when he heard his own father say that he could invite his friend to join him but he decided it would be a good idea if he just texted them to come over instead. Without further ado wally made his way back upstairs to his room and texted his friend to come over and surprisingly they said yes!
